steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: The subject is Mathematician Grigori Perelman, which is singular. The phrase between commas, sometimes in conjunction with mathematicians Richard S. Hamilton and Shing-Tung Yau, is extra information and does not make the subject plural.

steps.title: Choose singular agreement
steps.content: B, C, and D are plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular subject. The sentence needs a singular verb before credited. The answer is A.
